subcodes.first_line: O My Mahdi! Be thou a guide and become a herald. Call out the Name of God, that from thy tongue may stream forth the waters of divine knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی من هادی شو و منادی گرد نام یزدان بخوان تا از زبان سیل عرفان جاری و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God
